Chocho Snack

Traditional Andean Recipe · Modern Gourmet Format

Traditional product reinterpreted for modern consumption. Chocho with chilis, preserving authentic flavors with a gourmet finish suitable for retail and international food service. Ready to eat, 250g or 530g per jar.
